Item Name: Rani Organic Quinoa Flour (Incan Grain) 16oz (1lb) 454g ~ All Natural | Vegan | Gluten Friendly | NON-GMO | Kosher | Indian Origin | USDA Certified Organic
Bullet Point 1: You'll LOVE our Organic Quinoa Flour (Incan Grain) by Rani Brand--Here's Why:
Bullet Point 2: 🌾Now KOSHER! USDA Certified Organic, Vegan, 100% Natural, No preservatives, Non-GMO, Gluten Friendly, PREMIUM Gourmet Food Grade Flour.
Bullet Point 3: 🌾Quinoa flour is a finely ground Quinoa grains. Great substitute for All Purpose Flour / Wheat Flour.
Bullet Point 4: 🌾 It can be used as a substitute for wheat flour in a variety of recipes, including bread, pancakes, muffins, and cookies.
Bullet Point 5: 🌾Net Wt. 16oz (1lb) 454g, Authentic Indian Product.
Product Description: Quinoa flour is a type of flour made from finely ground quinoa grains. Quinoa flour is popular among those following gluten-free diets or looking to incorporate more nutrient-rich ingredients into their cooking and baking. It can be used as a substitute for wheat flour in a variety of recipes, including bread, pancakes, muffins, and cookies. Quinoa flour adds a nutty flavor and a boost of protein to dishes, making it a versatile and nutritious choice for both savory and sweet recipes.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic quinoa flour positioned as a high-quality, gourmet ingredient. USDA Organic and Kosher certifications, along with gluten-free and non-GMO claims, justify a higher price point. Targets health-conscious consumers seeking nutrient-rich alternatives to wheat flour. Packaging emphasizes natural and vegan attributes, reinforcing premium positioning.

Item Name: Granny's Confections Jalapeno Peanut Brittle (Spicy Brittle Candy). Made with Real Jalapenos. Nice Balance of Sweet and Heat. Granny's Old Fashioned Peanut Brittle Recipe With An Added Little Kick. Gift for Mother's Day, Father's Day, Christmas, Birthday. 1 Pound (454g) Bag.
Bullet Point 1: Each Bag of Gluten Free Jalapeno Peanut Brittle contains all the deliciousness of Granny's famous Peanut Brittle recipe with an added little kick from spicy jalapenos. You will be glad you tried it
Bullet Point 2: The perfect combination of sweet and spicy, Granny's Confections Jalapeno Peanut Brittle will make it nearly impossible for you to eat just one piece! Jalapeno Brittle is a must try for everyone.
Bullet Point 3: Crafted using only premium ingredients, this tasty treat is a spicy twist on the traditional peanut brittle made right here in the USA, Michigan to be exact. Jalapeno brittle is a great spicy brittle
Bullet Point 4: How do you improve the perfect peanut brittle? Add jalapeno. Our jalapeno peanut brittle makes an amazing spicy brittle that you can't put down. Goes great with an adult beverage (wink, wink).
Bullet Point 5: Perfect for gifting or sharing at parties and events; show your guests how much you care with Granny's Confections Jalapeno Peanut Brittle! Peanut Brittle that leaves you wanting more. Perfect Gift.
Product Description: Grannys Confections jalapeno peanut brittle is made by hand just like our traditional peanut brittle, but with a little kick. Everyone needs a little spice in their life. Utilizing only the best ingredients, including Virginia Peanuts, Pure Vanilla Extract, Jalapenos ripened and picked just at the perfect time, and Real Butter, our dedication to quality and taste makes our jalapeno peanut brittle stand out from the rest. We make every single batch of jalapeno peanut brittle by hand, making only small batches at a time to ensure quality, texture and taste. Rumor has it, our jalapeno peanut brittle goes great with an adult beverage (wink, wink). We then break each batch by hand and then hand pack each order. As you can see, we are dedicated to making sure the jalapeno peanut brittle you receive is the same peanut brittle that granny made. Our gourmet jalapeno peanut brittle is loaded with Virginia Peanuts that bring that time honored taste to life in every single bite. As an added bonus, all of our handmade brittles are glute free. That’s right, our handmade jalapeno peanut brittle is gluten free. Our handmade jalapeno peanut brittle makes the perfect gift for every occasion including birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, Christmas, presents, and any other occasion. Don’t forget, our jalapeno peanut brittle is also a great gift for yourself. Treat yourself to some of the most indulgent, spicy jalapeno peanut brittle you will ever taste. At Grannys Confections, we pride ourselves on making sure everything we do is done the way granny did it. We make everything with love, quality and respect. Grannys Confections handmade jalapeno peanut brittle is proudly made in Michigan. Order a pound or two now and see what people have been talking about.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium handmade confection positioned as a gourmet, artisanal product with a spicy twist. Emphasizes quality ingredients, small-batch production, and gluten-free certification. Packaging and branding suggest a mid-to-high price point, targeting adult consumers for gifting or personal indulgence. Made in the USA adds to perceived value.
